title: Wittgenstein's Nachlass
excerpts:
Section Title: Wittgenstein's Nachlass
Content:
On October 31, 2017, the philosophical Nachlass of Ludwig Wittgenstein was inscribed to the [UNESCO Memory of the World](https://webarchive.unesco.org/web/20220331180540/http://www.unesco.org/new/en/communication-and-information/memory-of-the-world/register/full-list-of-registered-heritage/registered-heritage-page-7/philosophical-nachlass-of-ludwig-wittgenstein) list. We are proud and happy that we are central in giving the world access to the philosophical Nachlass of Ludwig Wittgenstein.
A sortable table of Wittgenstein's Nachlass and publications thereof can be found [here](http://wab.uib.no/wab_nachlass-table.page) .
 ... 
Section Title: Wittgenstein's Nachlass > Ongoing:
Content:
(2009-) Nachlass text editions on [Wittgenstein Source](http://www.wittgensteinsource.org/) [NB: Currently available for 5000 pages only]. (2009-) Working towards a [Wittgenstein ontology](http://wab.uib.no/wab_philospace.page) .
